name: Space Pioneer

overview.value: Space Pioneer, also known as Beijing Tianbing Technology Co., Ltd., is a Chinese aerospace company founded in 2019 by Kang Yonglai, the former CTO of LandSpace. It is developing reusable orbital launch vehicles and liquid rocket engines to serve China's national satellite internet project and CNSA resupply of the Tiangong space station. Its Tianlong-2 rocket reached orbit on its first attempt in April 2023, and the company is now developing the larger, partially reusable Tianlong-3.

focus.value: reusable orbital launch vehicles and liquid rocket engines

notes: Added in the audit Phase 3 backfill (2026-07-08), verify-then-add.
